briefdescription.para: An equation that computes a (true) constant (e.g., x = 3).
An equation that computes a computed constant (e.g., x = 3+5, x = 3+z, x = y+z where y and z are (true or computed) constants).
An equation that computes an ordinary differential equation (e.g., d(y)/dt = f(t, x)).
An equation that computes one or several algebraic variables (e.g., x+y = f(z) where x and y are known, but not z).
An equation that computes an algebraic variable (e.g., y = f(x)).
A placeholder equation that captures the dependency of the model on an external variable.
The type of an equation.

detaileddescription.para: The type of an equation, i.e. whether it is used to compute a (true) constant, a computed constant, a rate, an algebraic variable, or whether it is a placeholder for an external variable.

briefdescription.para: Private member to implementation pointer,.
Destructor,.
Copy constructor,.
Move constructor,.
Assignment operator,.
Constructor,.
Get the Type of this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the Type of this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The Type.

briefdescription.para: Get the AnalyserEquationAst for this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the AnalyserEquationAst for this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The AnalyserEquationAst.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of dependencies for this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of dependencies for this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of dependencies for this AnalyserEquation.

briefdescription.para: Get the list of AnalyserEquation dependencies.

detaileddescription.para: Return the list of AnalyserEquation items which correspond to the equations on which this AnalyserEquation depends.

simplesect.para: The dependencies as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the dependency, at index, for this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the dependency, at index, for this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the dependency to return.

simplesect.para: The dependency, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the index of the NLA system of this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the index of the NLA system where this AnalyserEquation is used. A value of MAX_SIZE_T indicates that this AnalyserEquation is not used in an NLA system.

simplesect.para: The index of the NLA system.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of NLA siblings for this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of NLA siblings for this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of NLA siblings for this AnalyserEquation.

briefdescription.para: Get the list of AnalyserEquation NLA siblings.

detaileddescription.para: Return the list of AnalyserEquation items which are NLA siblings of this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The NLA siblings as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the NLA sibling, at index, for this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the NLA sibling, at index, for this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the NLA sibling to return.

simplesect.para: The NLA sibling, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Test to determine if this AnalyserEquation relies on states and/or rates.

detaileddescription.para: Test to determine if this AnalyserEquation relies on states and/or rates, return true if it does and false otherwise.

simplesect.para: true if this AnalyserEquation relies on states and/or rates, false otherwise.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of states computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of states computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of states.

briefdescription.para: Get the states computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the states computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The states as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the state, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the state, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the state to return.

simplesect.para: The state, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of computed constants computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of computed constants computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of computed constants.

briefdescription.para: Get the computed constants computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the computed constants computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The computed constants as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the computed constant, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the computed constant, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the computed constant to return.

simplesect.para: The computed constant, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of algebraic variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of algebraic variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of algebraic variables.

briefdescription.para: Get the algebraic variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the algebraic variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The algebraic variables as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the algebraic variable, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the algebraic variable, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the algebraic variable to return.

simplesect.para: The algebraic variable, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the number of external variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the number of external variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The number of external variables.

briefdescription.para: Get the external variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the external variables computed by this AnalyserEquation.

simplesect.para: The external variables as a std::vector.

briefdescription.para: Get the external variable, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

detaileddescription.para: Return the external variable, at index, computed by this AnalyserEquation.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the external variable to return.

simplesect.para: The external variable, at index, on success, nullptr on failure.

briefdescription.para: Get the string version of a Type.

detaileddescription.para: Return the string version of a Type.

parameterdescription.para: The type for which we want the string version.

simplesect.para: The string version of the Type.

briefdescription.para: The AnalyserEquation class.

detaileddescription.para: The AnalyserEquation class is for representing an equation in the context of a CellML Analyser.
